mapper.select: SELECT oprtr_id, ognz_id, icao_desig, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, lglrpr_nm, lglrpr_cnct, addr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_oprtr WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY oprtr_id

SELECT oprtr_id, ognz_id, icao_desig, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, lglrpr_nm, lglrpr_cnct, addr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_oprtr WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

SELECT o.oprtr_id, o.ognz_id, o.icao_desig, o.oprtr_nm, o.oprtr_nm_en, o.aoc_no, o.aoc_isue_dt, o.aoc_xpr_dt, o.aoc_athrty_nm, o.parent_co_nm, o.lglrpr_nm, o.lglrpr_cnct, o.addr, o.use_bgng_dt, o.use_end_dt, o.frst_reg_dt, o.frst_reg_user_id, o.last_chg_dt, o.last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_oprtr o WHERE NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt
AND o.oprtr_id = #{oprtrId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = o.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = #{rprtYr} AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )
ORDER BY o.oprtr_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM com.tn_oprtr WHERE icao_desig = #{icaoDesig} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(oprtr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM com.tn_oprtr WHERE oprtr_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(oprtr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_oprtr (oprtr_id, ognz_id, icao_desig, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, lglrpr_nm, lglrpr_cnct, addr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{oprtrId}, #{ognzId}, #{icaoDesig}, #{oprtrNm}, #{oprtrNmEn}, #{aocNo}, #{aocIsueDt}, #{aocXprDt}, #{aocAthrtyNm}, #{parentCoNm}, #{lglrprNm}, #{lglrprCnct}, #{addr}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_oprtr SET ognz_id = #{ognzId}, icao_desig = #{icaoDesig}, oprtr_nm = #{oprtrNm}, oprtr_nm_en = #{oprtrNmEn}, aoc_no = #{aocNo}, aoc_isue_dt = #{aocIsueDt}, aoc_xpr_dt = #{aocXprDt}, aoc_athrty_nm = #{aocAthrtyNm}, parent_co_nm = #{parentCoNm}, lglrpr_nm = #{lglrprNm}, lglrpr_cnct = #{lglrprCnct}, addr = #{addr}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
